## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (PATCH bump)
- [ ] New feature (MINOR bump)
- [ ] Breaking API change (MAJOR bump)
- [ ] Documentation / tests only (no version bump required)

## Versioning Checklist

- [ ] I bumped `version` in `pyproject.toml` (or this is a docs/tests-only PR)
- [ ] Version follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/): PATCH for fixes, MINOR for features, MAJOR for breaking changes

## Test Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] `uv run black minirag/ tests/ --check` passes
- [ ] Hybrid tests pass (or skipped cleanly with `pytest.importorskip`)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: migration steps, follow-up issues, benchmarks, etc. -->
